issues.description: Action type 'ForceDiscard' is incorrect. Card effect states 'Trash up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards' — this should use 'FlipLife' (legacy alias for TakeLifeToHand) to target opponent's Life cards, not hand discard.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and actions [DrawCard, TrashFromHand] has no basis in official card text. Only one effect exists: the On K.O. effect. This entire second effect should be removed.
